name: Pecan Chocolate Chip Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Prepare pie crust by blending flour, butter, and salt in a food processor until it forms a dough ball. You can also mix these ingredients in a bowl using a pastry blender or forks.
3. Melt the butter and set aside.
4. In a separate bowl, whisk together eggs and sugar. Gradually add light corn syrup and melted butter.
5. Spread chocolate chips and pecan pieces evenly over the bottom of the pie crust.
6. Pour the egg and sugar mixture over the chocolate and pecans.
7. Bake for about 35 minutes.
